packageRules.description: Disabled by default — this Renovate config is scoped to the @orangecheck/* family ONLY. Third-party deps (next, react, tailwind, etc.) are NOT auto-tracked here; bump them by hand when you choose to.
Auto-merge @orangecheck/* patch + minor — bundled into one PR per consumer, 1-day stability window so a yanked publish never reaches a consumer.
Human-review @orangecheck/* major bumps — these change wire shape.
